title: ace's official trailer look
description: recreating the classic official minecraft trailer look
body:
[![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png)](https://www.boxtoplay.com/en/minecraft-hosting/minecraft-server)
Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great)

pretty simple, recreates how the official minecraft trailers look ! for 1.21 fabric and neoforge

yes I know the game crashes when you quit a world but it shouldn't be a problem at all

don't republish the modpack, you can base a modpack off of this one though
